option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/graduationcap201" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/graduationcap201" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.AIStudyAssistance">
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.SignUpActivity" android:exported="true" />
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.PhoneVerificationActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.SignInActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".ui.home.MainActivity" android:exported="true" />
<activity android:name=".ui.home.QuizPerformanceActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.home.TopicsMasteryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.chat.ChatActivity" android:exported="false" android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize" />
<activity android:name=".ui.profile.ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.upload.UploadActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizSetupActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizResultActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.flashcard.FlashcardSetupActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.flashcard.FlashcardActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/graduationcap201" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/graduationcap201" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.AIStudyAssistance">
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.SignUpActivity" android:exported="true" />
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.PhoneVerificationActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.launcher.LaunchLoaderActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".ui.auth.SignInActivity" android:exported="true" />
<activity android:name=".ui.home.MainActivity" android:exported="true" />
<activity android:name=".ui.home.QuizPerformanceActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.home.TopicsMasteryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.chat.ChatActivity" android:exported="false" android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize" />
<activity android:name=".ui.profile.ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.upload.UploadActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizSetupActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.quiz.QuizResultActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.flashcard.FlashcardSetupActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ui.flashcard.FlashcardActivity" android:exported="false" />
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background" android:padding="@dimen/space_24">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutLoaderContent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLoaderLogo" android:layout_width="96dp" android:layout_height="96dp" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" android:src="@drawable/graduationcap201" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLoaderAppName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_16" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" android:textStyle="bold" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressLoader" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleLarge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_20" android:indeterminate="true" android:indeterminateTint="@color/primary" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Card" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/space_12" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/space_16">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryTopicTitle" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:text="Topic" android:textSize="@dimen/text_section" tools:text="Machine Learning Fundamentals" />
<View android:layout_width="@dimen/space_4" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryTopicLevel" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/space_8" android:paddingVertical="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Beginner" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption" tools:text="Intermediate" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryQuizCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_purple" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="12" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quizzes" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryFlashcardCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_green" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="24" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Flashcards" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryChatCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_orange" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="8" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chats" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressMasteryLevel" style="@style/Widget.Material3.LinearProgressIndicator" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:max="100" android:progress="0" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" app:trackColor="@color/primary_light" tools:progress="65" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_8" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryProgressLabel" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Mastery Progress" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" tools:text="65% Mastered" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryLastActive" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Last active: Never" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" tools:text="Last active: Today" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/space_12" android:background="@color/divider" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMasteryPracticeQuiz" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Button.Secondary" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" android:iconGravity="textStart" android:iconPadding="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Practice Quiz" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMasteryOpenFlashcards" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Button.Secondary" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/space_8" android:layout_weight="1" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_gallery" android:iconGravity="textStart" android:iconPadding="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Flashcards" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Card" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/space_12" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/space_16">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryTopicTitle" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:text="Topic" android:textSize="@dimen/text_section" tools:text="Machine Learning Fundamentals" />
<View android:layout_width="@dimen/space_4" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryTopicLevel" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_chip" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/space_8" android:paddingVertical="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Beginner" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="@dimen/text_caption" tools:text="Intermediate" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryQuizCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_purple" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="12" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Quizzes" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryFlashcardCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_green" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="24" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Flashcards" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryChatCount" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Section" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/accent_orange" android:textSize="@dimen/text_title" tools:text="8" />
<TextView style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chats" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressMasteryLevel" style="@style/Widget.Material3.LinearProgressIndicator" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:max="100" android:progress="0" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" app:trackColor="@color/primary_light" tools:progress="65" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_8" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryProgressLabel" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Mastery Progress" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" tools:text="65% Mastered" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMasteryLastActive" style="@style/TextAppearance.AIStudyAssistance.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Last active: Never" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" tools:text="Last active: Today" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/space_12" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/space_12" android:background="@color/divider" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMasteryPracticeQuiz" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Button.Secondary" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Practice Quiz" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMasteryOpenFlashcards" style="@style/Widget.AIStudyAssistance.Button.Secondary" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/space_8" android:layout_weight="1" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_gallery" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="@dimen/space_4" android:text="Flashcards" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AI Study Assistance</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">YOUR_WEB_CLIENT_ID</string> <string name="title_home">Home</string> <string name="title_chat">Chat</string> <string name="title_upload">Upload</string> <string name="title_quiz">Quiz</string> <string name="title_profile">Profile</string> <string name="profile_default_name">Student</string> <string name="profile_default_initial">S</string> <string name="profile_label_email">Email</string> <string name="profile_label_phone">Phone Number</string> <string name="profile_not_available">Not available</string> <string name="profile_logout">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_title">Logout?</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_message">You will be signed out of your account.</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_action">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_cancel_action">Cancel</string> <string name="profile_photo">Profile Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_upload">Upload Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_change">Change Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_remove">Remove Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_action_hint">Tap avatar to upload, change, or remove photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_sheet_subtitle">Choose how you want your profile photo to appear.</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_title">Edit Name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_hint">Enter your name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_save">Save</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_subtitle">This name appears on your profile and home welcome text.</string> <string name="profile_name_action_hint">Tap your name to edit</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_success">Name updated</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_failed">Could not update name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_empty_error">Name cannot be empty</string> <string name="profile_learning_snapshot_title">Learning Snapshot</string> <string name="profile_learning_snapshot_subtitle">A quick view of your current study progress.</string> <string name="profile_learning_streak_label">Streak</string> <string name="profile_learning_streak_value">%1$d days</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_label">Total Study Time</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_hours_minutes">%1$dh %2$dm</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_minutes">%1$dm</string> <string name="profile_learning_quizzes_label">Quizzes Completed</string> <string name="profile_learning_quizzes_value">%1$d</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_label">Last Active</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_never">Never</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_today">Today</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_yesterday">Yesterday</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_start">Start your first study streak today.</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_risk">Streak at risk today - study now to keep it.</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_safe">Great work today. Keep your streak alive tomorrow.</string>
<string name="profile_performance_title">Quiz Performance</string> <string name="profile_performance_avg_score">Avg Score</string> <string name="profile_performance_high_score">High Score</string> <string name="profile_performance_topics_mastered">Topics Mastered</string> <string name="profile_performance_topics_mastered_action">Open topic mastery details</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_format">%1$d%%</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_empty">--</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_helper">Based on %1$d completed quizzes</string> <string name="profile_performance_guidance_empty">Start a quiz to see your performance trends.</string> <string name="profile_performance_guidance_with_data">Tap Topics Mastered for topic-level practice options.</string> <string name="profile_performance_weekly_insight_positive">+%1$d quizzes this week</string> <string name="profile_performance_weekly_insight_zero">No quizzes this week yet</string> <string name="profile_cta_practice_quiz">Practice Quiz</string> <string name="profile_cta_review_flashcards">Review Flashcards</string>
<string name="profile_materials_title">My Study Materials</string> <string name="profile_materials_btn">Manage Materials</string> <plurals name="profile_materials_count"> <item quantity="one">%1$d file uploaded</item> <item quantity="other">%1$d files uploaded</item> </plurals> <string name="profile_materials_unavailable">Unable to load materials</string>
<string name="profile_consistency_title">Weekly Consistency</string> <string name="profile_consistency_subtitle">Your activity over the last 7 days.</string> <string name="profile_recent_activity_title">Recent Activity</string> <string name="profile_recent_activity_empty">No recent activity found.</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_title">Topic Mastery</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_empty">Start learning to see your mastery here.</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_stats">Quiz %1$d • Flashcards %2$d • Chat %3$d</string>
<string name="common_back">Back</string> <string name="common_previous">Previous</string> <string name="common_next">Next</string> <string name="common_refreshed">Refreshed</string>
<string name="flashcard_title">Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_title_with_topic">Flashcards: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_general_study">General Study</string> <string name="flashcard_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_study_mode">Study Mode</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_quick_review">Quick Review</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_active_recall">Active Recall</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_initial">Card 1 / 10</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_format">Card %1$d / %2$d</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_initial">0s</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_format">%1$ds</string> <string name="flashcard_flip">Flip</string> <string name="flashcard_swipe_hint">Swipe left or right to navigate cards.</string> <string name="flashcard_deck_completed">Deck Completed!</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards_initial">Total Cards: 10</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_initial">Easy: 0 | Medium: 0 | Hard: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time_initial">Avg Time: 0 sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted_initial">Unattempted Cards: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards">Total Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_breakdown">Easy: %1$d | Medium: %2$d | Hard: %3$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time">Avg Time: %1$d sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted">Unattempted Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_review_hard_cards">Review Hard Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_review_unattempted">Review Unattempted</string> <string name="flashcard_restart_session">Restart Session</string> <string name="flashcard_finish_study">Finish Study</string> <string name="flashcard_question_label">Question</string> <string name="flashcard_tap_to_reveal">Tap to reveal answer</string> <string name="flashcard_think_prompt">Think before revealing the answer.</string> <string name="flashcard_show_answer">Show Answer</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_easy">Easy</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_medium">Medium</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_hard">Hard</string>
<string name="flashcard_setup_title">Setup Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_source">Flashcard Source</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_by_topic">By Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_enter_topic">Enter Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_placeholder">Selected Note: Physics.pdf</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_deck_size">Deck Size</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_number_of_cards">Number of Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_initial">10</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_format">Flashcards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generate_deck">Generate Deck</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generating">Generating Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_select_note">Select Note</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_no_notes_uploaded">No notes uploaded</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_empty">Selected Note: -</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_format">Selected Note: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_login_required">Please login to access notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_load_notes_failed">Failed to load notes: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generation_failed">Could not generate flashcards. Please try again.</string>
<string name="chat_actions_previous_available">%1$d previous chats available.</string> <string name="chat_actions_previous_empty">No previous chat sessions yet.</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_title">Delete chat session?</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_message">Are you sure you want to delete this session?\n\n%1$s</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_confirm">Delete</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_failed">Could not delete this session.</string> <string name="recent_activity_options">Recent activity options</string> <string name="chat_suggest_next_questions">Suggest next questions</string> <string name="chat_refresh_questions">Refresh questions</string> <string name="chat_suggesting_questions">Suggesting…</string> <string name="chat_no_suggestions_available">No suggestions available right now.</string>
<string name="common_sending">Sending…</string>
<string name="signin_signing_in">Signing In…</string> <string name="signin_send_reset_link">Send Reset Link</string> <string name="signin_please_wait">Please wait…</string> <string name="signin_sign_in">Sign In</string>

%1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_flashcards_title">Flashcards - %1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_chat_title">AI Chat - %1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_upload_title">Upload - %1$s</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_title">Remove from Recent Activity</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_message">Remove "%1$s" from Recent Activity?</string> <string name="home_remove">Remove</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_failed">Could not remove this activity</string> <string name="home_recent_subtitle_format">%1$s • %2$s</string> <string name="home_welcome">Hello, %1$s </string> <string name="home_clear_recent_title">Clear recent activity</string> <string name="home_clear_recent_message">Remove all items from Recent Activity?</string> <string name="home_clear">Clear</string> <string name="home_no_flashcard_session">No flashcard session to resume</string> <string name="home_no_quiz_session">No quiz session to resume</string> <string name="home_continue_learning_title">Continue Learning</string> <string name="home_continue_learning_message">Resume where you left?</string> <string name="home_resume">Resume</string> <string name="home_start_over">Start Over</string> <string name="home_streak_value"> %1$d days</string> <string name="home_streak_hint_today">Great work today. Keep it going tomorrow!</string> <string name="home_streak_hint_keep">Study today to keep streak</string> <string name="home_last_active_never">Last active: Never</string> <string name="home_last_active_today">Last active: Today</string> <string name="home_last_active_yesterday">Last active: Yesterday</string> <string name="home_last_active_days_ago">Last active: %1$d days ago</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AI Study Assistance</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">YOUR_WEB_CLIENT_ID</string> <string name="title_home">Home</string> <string name="title_chat">Chat</string> <string name="title_upload">Upload</string> <string name="title_quiz">Quiz</string> <string name="title_profile">Profile</string> <string name="profile_default_name">Student</string> <string name="profile_default_initial">S</string> <string name="profile_label_email">Email</string> <string name="profile_label_phone">Phone Number</string> <string name="profile_not_available">Not available</string> <string name="profile_logout">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_title">Logout?</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_message">You will be signed out of your account.</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_action">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_cancel_action">Cancel</string> <string name="profile_photo">Profile Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_upload">Upload Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_change">Change Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_remove">Remove Photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_action_hint">Tap avatar to upload, change, or remove photo</string> <string name="profile_photo_sheet_subtitle">Choose how you want your profile photo to appear.</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_title">Edit Name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_hint">Enter your name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_save">Save</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_subtitle">This name appears on your profile and home welcome text.</string> <string name="profile_name_action_hint">Tap your name to edit</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_success">Name updated</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_failed">Could not update name</string> <string name="profile_edit_name_empty_error">Name cannot be empty</string> <string name="profile_learning_snapshot_title">Learning Snapshot</string> <string name="profile_learning_snapshot_subtitle">A quick view of your current study progress.</string> <string name="profile_learning_streak_label">Streak</string> <string name="profile_learning_streak_value">%1$d days</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_label">Total Study Time</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_hours_minutes">%1$dh %2$dm</string> <string name="profile_learning_time_minutes">%1$dm</string> <string name="profile_learning_quizzes_label">Quizzes Completed</string> <string name="profile_learning_quizzes_value">%1$d</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_label">Last Active</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_never">Never</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_today">Today</string> <string name="profile_learning_last_active_yesterday">Yesterday</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_start">Start your first study streak today.</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_risk">Streak at risk today - study now to keep it.</string> <string name="profile_learning_insight_safe">Great work today. Keep your streak alive tomorrow.</string>
<string name="profile_performance_title">Quiz Performance</string> <string name="profile_performance_avg_score">Avg Score</string> <string name="profile_performance_high_score">High Score</string> <string name="profile_performance_topics_mastered">Topics Mastered</string> <string name="profile_performance_topics_mastered_action">Open topic mastery details</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_format">%1$d%%</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_empty">--</string> <string name="profile_performance_score_helper">Based on %1$d completed quizzes</string> <string name="profile_performance_guidance_empty">Start a quiz to see your performance trends.</string> <string name="profile_performance_guidance_with_data">Tap Topics Mastered for topic-level practice options.</string> <string name="profile_performance_weekly_insight_positive">+%1$d quizzes this week</string> <string name="profile_performance_weekly_insight_zero">No quizzes this week yet</string> <string name="profile_cta_practice_quiz">Practice Quiz</string> <string name="profile_cta_review_flashcards">Review Flashcards</string>
<string name="profile_materials_title">My Study Materials</string> <string name="profile_materials_btn">Manage Materials</string> <plurals name="profile_materials_count"> <item quantity="one">%1$d file uploaded</item> <item quantity="other">%1$d files uploaded</item> </plurals> <string name="profile_materials_unavailable">Unable to load materials</string>
<string name="profile_consistency_title">Weekly Consistency</string> <string name="profile_consistency_subtitle">Your activity over the last 7 days.</string> <string name="profile_recent_activity_title">Recent Activity</string> <string name="profile_recent_activity_empty">No recent activity found.</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_title">Topic Mastery</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_empty">Start learning to see your mastery here.</string> <string name="profile_topic_mastery_stats">Quiz %1$d • Flashcards %2$d • Chat %3$d</string> <string name="topic_mastery_progress_label">%1$d%% mastered</string> <string name="topic_mastery_progress_a11y">Mastery progress: %1$d percent</string> <string name="topic_mastery_level_beginner">Beginner</string> <string name="topic_mastery_level_intermediate">Intermediate</string> <string name="topic_mastery_level_advanced">Advanced</string> <string name="topic_mastery_level_expert">Expert</string>
<string name="common_back">Back</string> <string name="common_previous">Previous</string> <string name="common_next">Next</string> <string name="common_refreshed">Refreshed</string>
<string name="flashcard_title">Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_title_with_topic">Flashcards: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_general_study">General Study</string> <string name="flashcard_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_study_mode">Study Mode</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_quick_review">Quick Review</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_active_recall">Active Recall</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_initial">Card 1 / 10</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_format">Card %1$d / %2$d</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_initial">0s</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_format">%1$ds</string> <string name="flashcard_flip">Flip</string> <string name="flashcard_swipe_hint">Swipe left or right to navigate cards.</string> <string name="flashcard_deck_completed">Deck Completed!</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards_initial">Total Cards: 10</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_initial">Easy: 0 | Medium: 0 | Hard: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time_initial">Avg Time: 0 sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted_initial">Unattempted Cards: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards">Total Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_breakdown">Easy: %1$d | Medium: %2$d | Hard: %3$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time">Avg Time: %1$d sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted">Unattempted Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_review_hard_cards">Review Hard Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_review_unattempted">Review Unattempted</string> <string name="flashcard_restart_session">Restart Session</string> <string name="flashcard_finish_study">Finish Study</string> <string name="flashcard_question_label">Question</string> <string name="flashcard_tap_to_reveal">Tap to reveal answer</string> <string name="flashcard_think_prompt">Think before revealing the answer.</string> <string name="flashcard_show_answer">Show Answer</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_easy">Easy</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_medium">Medium</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_hard">Hard</string>
<string name="flashcard_setup_title">Setup Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_source">Flashcard Source</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_by_topic">By Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_enter_topic">Enter Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_placeholder">Selected Note: Physics.pdf</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_deck_size">Deck Size</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_number_of_cards">Number of Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_initial">10</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_format">Flashcards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generate_deck">Generate Deck</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generating">Generating Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_select_note">Select Note</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_no_notes_uploaded">No notes uploaded</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_empty">Selected Note: -</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_format">Selected Note: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_login_required">Please login to access notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_load_notes_failed">Failed to load notes: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generation_failed">Could not generate flashcards. Please try again.</string>
<string name="chat_actions_previous_available">%1$d previous chats available.</string> <string name="chat_actions_previous_empty">No previous chat sessions yet.</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_title">Delete chat session?</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_message">Are you sure you want to delete this session?\n\n%1$s</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_confirm">Delete</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_failed">Could not delete this session.</string> <string name="recent_activity_options">Recent activity options</string> <string name="chat_suggest_next_questions">Suggest next questions</string> <string name="chat_refresh_questions">Refresh questions</string> <string name="chat_suggesting_questions">Suggesting…</string> <string name="chat_no_suggestions_available">No suggestions available right now.</string>

Keep it going tomorrow!</string> <string name="home_streak_hint_keep">Study today to keep streak</string> <string name="home_last_active_never">Last active: Never</string> <string name="home_last_active_today">Last active: Today</string> <string name="home_last_active_yesterday">Last active: Yesterday</string> <string name="home_last_active_days_ago">Last active: %1$d days ago</string> </resources>
